recommendations.title: Starship Troopers: Traitor of Mars
recommendations.overview: Federation trooper Johnny Rico is ordered to work with a group of new recruits on a satellite station on Mars, where giant bugs have decided to target their next attack.

recommendations.title: Space Pirate Captain Harlock
recommendations.overview: Space Pirate Captain Harlock and his fearless crew face off against the space invaders who seek to conquer the planet Earth.

recommendations.title: Appleseed
recommendations.overview: In a utopian society created at the end of World War III, a female warrior who has been plucked from the badlands begins to see cracks in this new facade. And what does this community have planned for the rest of humankind?

recommendations.title: Appleseed Alpha

recommendations.title: Starship Troopers: Invasion
recommendations.overview: The troopers of two starships have joined forces to terminate a massive bug attack at a Federation outpost. Before the mission can be completed and the survivors evacuated, one ship abruptly departs and goes inexplicably dark. The remaining battle-ha

recommendations.title: Halo Legends
recommendations.overview: The universe of the Halo video game series is expanded in seven short animated films from Japan's greatest anime directors and studios.
recommendations.director: Shinji Aramaki, Tomoki Kyoda, Koji Sawai, Koichi Mashimo, Keiichi Sugiyama, Hiroshi Yamazaki, Takahiro Tanaka, Toshiyuki Kanno, Megumi Shimizu, Mamoru Oshii, Hiroyuki Kawasaki, Daisuke Nishio, Yasushi Muraki, Hideki Futamura

recommendations.title: X-Men: Days of Future Past
recommendations.overview: The ultimate X-Men ensemble fights a war for the survival of the species across two time periods as they join forces with their younger selves in an epic battle that must change the past – to save our future.

recommendations.title: Inception: The Cobol Job
recommendations.overview: Cobb, Arthur and Nash are enlisted by Cobol Engineering.

recommendations.title: Jin-Roh: The Wolf Brigade
recommendations.genres: Animation, Drama, Romance, Thriller, Science Fiction

recommendations.title: Deathstroke: Knights & Dragons - The Movie
recommendations.overview: The assassin Deathstroke tries to save his family from the wrath of H.I.V.E. and the murderous Jackal.
